final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing full-screen mobile advertisement banner for a flagship smartphone launch campaign.

Style/medium: needs a high-impact brand-exposure aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen vertical layout optimized for mobile display
Subject: must include a flagship smartphone as the hero product, front-and-center
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, visually striking backdrop — exact scene treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a high visual-impact atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, premium brand direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, premium surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be 1080×1920 portrait format; visual impact is the primary priority
Avoid:
